human_rubric: Motion-only structure is clear without encouraging literal source copying.
The requested JSON evidence is understandable to a human reviewer.

vars.creative_direction: Preserve pose and lighting; keep the composition natural and restrained.
human_rubric: The reference fidelity instructions preserve pose, crop, lighting, and setting.
The instruction requests one standalone image and leaves identity to Soul ID.
The hook is readable at Reel speed and has an obvious engagement mechanic.
The tone fits the selected creator without requiring an automated model grader.
